description: a helper module which generates a filtered filelist from the input filelist and some filter parameters.
author: Peter Carr, Broad Institute
plan:
## FilterFilelist GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
FilterFilelist is a GenePattern module that a helper module which generates a filtered filelist from the input filelist and some filter parameters.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: input.filelist
- Optional: includePattern, type, errorOnEmptySet, output.filename

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>FilterFilelist.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-annotations.jar<path.separator><libdir>jopt-simple-3.3.jar<path.separator><libdir>jakarta-oro-2.0.8.jar org.genepattern.module.filterfilelist.FilterFilelist <input.filelist> <includePattern> <type> <errorOnEmptySet> <output.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.filelist
parameters.description: the initial input filelist, a file containing a list of filepaths

parameters.name: includePattern
parameters.description: an optional list of filename patterns to match, e.g. *.cls,*.gct

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Include files, directories, or both files and directories in the output filelist

parameters.name: errorOnEmptySet
parameters.description: Whether the module should output stderr if the output result is empty

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: the name of the output file, if none specified, write to stdout
